address_type.description: The type of address to reserve, either INTERNAL or EXTERNAL. If EXTERNAL is selected, no other inputs are required. If INTERNAL is selected, the network and purpose fields are required.

purpose.description: The purpose of the resource.(Shared or Not Shared)

network.description: The URL of the network in which to reserve the IP range. This field is mandatory if the Address Type is INTERNAL.

address.description: The IP address or beginning of the address range represented by this resource. This can be supplied as an input to reserve a specific address or omitted to allow GCP to choose a valid one for you.

prefix_length.description: The prefix length of the IP range. If not supplied, the IP range will be considered as a single IP.

description.description: An optional description of this resource.

ip_version.description: The IP Version that will be used by this address.
